summary: Tested Playback features (Reactions, Polls, Watch Party) for Koora Voice app. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: ReactionBar with 7 emojis visible at bottom of room, Settings modal contains Watch Party and Poll buttons under 'ميزات Playback' section.

backend_apis: GET /api/rooms/{room_id}/watch-party - Get watch party state - 200 OK
Unauthorized access tests - All return 401/403 as expected
frontend_features: ReactionBar component visible at bottom of RoomPage with 7 emojis (🎉😢😮😂❤️👏🔥)
FloatingReactions component integrated (reactions float up when sent)
Settings modal accessible via gear icon in top right
Watch Party button present in Settings modal under 'ميزات Playback' section
Create Poll button present in Settings modal under 'ميزات Playback' section
Room page loads correctly with stage, chat, and controls

critical_code_review_comments: Backend APIs use Pydantic models (ReactionCreate, VoteCreate, WatchPartySync) for JSON validation - correctly implemented
MongoDB ObjectId serialization handled by copying docs before insert (doc_to_insert = reaction_doc.copy())
Frontend polling intervals: Reactions every 2s, Polls every 3s, Watch Party every 5s - appropriate for real-time features
FloatingReactions uses framer-motion for smooth animations
PollCard component handles voting state and shows results after voting

frontend: RoomPage.js imports and integrates all Playback components
Polling for reactions/polls/watch-party in RoomPage.js useEffect

context_for_next_testing_agent: Playback features fully tested: 1) Reactions API sends/receives emojis with 2s polling, FloatingReactions animates them floating up. 2) Polls API creates/votes/closes polls with 3s polling, PollCard shows live results. 3) Watch Party API starts/syncs/ends synchronized video watching with 5s polling. All features accessible via Settings modal (gear icon) in room. ReactionBar with 7 emojis visible at bottom of room page.
